samples.title: Simple completed run
samples.description: Single-turn run with prompt snapshot, request fingerprint, and redacted context.

samples.title: Tool call allowed by policy
samples.description: Two-turn run where a deterministic tool call is allowed and produces a recorded output.

samples.title: Handoff accepted by policy
samples.description: Two-turn run where a handoff is accepted, the active agent changes, and the target agent completes the response.

samples.title: Handoff denied as tool result
samples.description: Two-turn run where the handoff is denied, the source agent remains active, and the denial is visible in policy decisions and tool output.

samples.title: Compare baseline with tool usage
samples.description: Baseline record for visual comparison, with one customer profile lookup.

samples.title: Compare candidate without tool usage
samples.description: Candidate record for visual comparison, answering directly without a tool call.
